topical_tags.term: Beit Shammai vs. Beit Hillel (stringent vs. lenient periods)
Rabbi Meir (strict like Beit Shammai, but lenient on appearance)
Haroeh Dam Machamat Tashmish (bleeding as result of intercourse)
Shoferet test (tube and applicator for detecting uterine blood)
Rabban Shimon ben Gamliel (uterine wound blood is tamei)
Ayin Hara (evil eye and psychological causation)
One drop of blood rule (like mustard seed)
Zavah Gedolah (woman with three days of bleeding)
Rav Pappa (amora supporting universal application of seven clean days)
Rabbi Zeira (originator of benot Yisrael practice)
Sudden announcement stringency (excitement causes bleeding assumption)
Minor girl (ketanah) and sexual desire assumptions
